schema.description: Payload to schedule a transformation job from a server-side source

specId.description: ID of the spec to use for parsing and validation

sourceType.description: Where the source file comes from
sourceType.title: SourceType

sourceFilePath.description: Absolute path to the source file (LOCAL_PATH or S3 URI)

outputFilePath.description: Output file path (used when destinationType is a file)

skipInvalidRecords.description: Skip invalid records instead of aborting the job

delayMs.description: Milliseconds to wait before starting the job (0 = immediate)

cronExpression.description: Cron expression for recurring execution (e.g. `0 2 * * *` = 2 AM daily)

runOnce.description: Run the job once then remove it (false = recurring cron job)

schema.title: TransformRequest
